title: Sleeping Tabby Cat Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this warm and cozy sleeping tabby cat coloring page. Perfect for kids and pet lovers. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Cats have a specialized reflective layer in their eyes called the tapetum lucidum, allowing them to see in near-total darkness.
Domestic cats share 95.6% of their genetic makeup with wild tigers, displaying many of the same stalking and instincts.
Coloring kittens and cats stimulates creativity and recognition of feline body language.
